description: Play this card after any player rolls the dice. DISCARD your hand. +7 to that roll.

name: Lightning Labrys
effect: DISCARD up to 3 cards. For each card discarded, choose a player. That player must SACRIFICE a Hero card.
description: DISCARD up to 3 cards. For each card discarded, choose a player. That player must SACRIFICE a Hero card.

name: Mass Sacrifice
effect: DISCARD your hand, then DRAW 5 cards.
description: DISCARD your hand, then DRAW 5 cards.

name: Berserker Challenge
effect: You may play this card when another player attempts to play a Hero, Item, or Magic card. CHALLENGE that card. +3 to your roll.

name: Necromancer Challenge
effect: You may play this card when another player attempts to play a Hero, Item, or Magic card. CHALLENGE that card. +3 to your roll.

name: Ancient Megashark
effect: Each time you roll to ATTACK a Monster card, +1 to that roll.

name: Clawed Nightmare
effect: Each time you end your turn with no cards in your hand, you may pull 2 cards from another player's hand.

name: Dragon Wasp
effect: Each time one of your Hero cards would be sacrificed or destroyed, you may DISCARD 2 cards instead.

name: Goretelodont
effect: Each time you end your turn with no cards in your hand, you may DRAW 3 cards.

name: Lumbering Demon
effect: Each time you would DRAW a card, you may DRAW 2 cards and DISCARD a card instead.

name: Possessed Plush
effect: Each time you play a Challenge card, DRAW a card.

name: Reef Ripper
effect: Each time you unsuccessfully roll to use a Hero card's effect, you may DRAW a card.

name: Saffyre Phoenix
effect: Each time one of your Hero cards is sacrificed or destroyed, you may play a Hero card from your hand immediately.

name: Scavenger Griffin
effect: Each time you end your turn with no cards in your hand, you may STEAL a Hero card.

name: Venomous Gemini
effect: Venomous Gemini counts as 2 slain Monster cards.

name: Voltclaw Lion
effect: Each time you play a Magic card, DRAW a card.

name: Wandering Behemoth
effect: Each time one of your Hero cards is sacrificed, you may DRAW a card.

name: Wicked Sea Serpent
effect: Each time you play an Item card, DRAW a card.
